title: Fluffy Egyptian Lentils Flatbread
description: A buttery, airy flatbread filled with a savory braised lentil mix, perfect for a plant‑based Egyptian meal.

ingredients.name: Flaxseed meal with water (2 tbsp flaxseed + 6 tbsp water)
Spice blend (1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp coriander, 1/2 tsp paprika, 1 tsp salt, 1/2 tsp pepper)

instructions: In a large bowl whisk flour, baking powder, and salt.
Add melted butter and stir until crumbs form.
Pour plant-based milk and mix until dough comes together.
Fold in flaxseed water packet to bind the dough and knead until smooth.
Cover the dough and let it rest for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile sauté onion and garlic in a pan until translucent, then add tomato paste and spice blend, cooking for 2 minutes.
Stir in cooked lentils, season with additional salt if needed, and remove from heat.
Divide the rested dough into 4 equal portions, roll each into a round flatbread about 6 inches in diameter.
Heat a dry skillet over medium‑high heat, cook each flatbread for 2–3 minutes per side until golden and puffed, then top with lentil mixture and serve hot.
